mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite_folders (id, user_id, name) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{name})
mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.user_id, f.name, f.created_at FROM favorite_folders f WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.created_at ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM favorite_folders WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite_folders WHERE user_id = #{userId}
